/**\n23:  * Pricer for foreign exchange vanilla option transaction products with a lognormal model.\n24:  * <p>\n25:  * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOption}.\n26:  * <p>\n27:  * All of the computation is be based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n28:  * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n29:  */\n30: public class BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer {\n31: \n32:   /**\n33:    * Default implementation.\n34:    */\n35:   public static final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer DEFAULT =\n36:       new BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\n37: \n38:   /**\n39:    * Underlying FX pricer.\n40:    */\n41:   private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\n42: \n43:   /**\n44:    * Creates an instance.\n45:    * \n46:    * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\n47:    */\n48:   public BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(\n49:       DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\n50:     this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \"fxPricer\");\n51:   }\n52: \n53:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n54:   /**\n55:    * Returns the pricer used to price the underlying FX product.\n56:    * \n57:    * @return the pricer\n58:    */\n59:   DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer getDiscountingFxSingleProductPricer() {\n60:     return fxPricer;\n61:   }\n62: \n63:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n64:   /**\n65:    * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n66:    * <p>\n67:    * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \n68:    * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\n69:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\n70:    * \n71:    * @param option  the option product\n72:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n73:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n74:    * @return the price of the product\n75:    */\n76:   public double price(\n77:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n78:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n79:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n80: \n81:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n82:     double forwardPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n83:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n84:     return discountFactor * forwardPrice;\n85:   }\n86: \n87:   /**\n88:    * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n89:    * <p>\n90:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\n91:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\n92:    * \n93:    * @param option  the option product\n94:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n95:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n96:    * @return the present value of the product\n97:    */\n98:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n99:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n100:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n101:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n102: \n103:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n104:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n105:   }\n106: \n107:   // the price without discounting\n108:   private double undiscountedPrice(\n109:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n110:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n111:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n112: \n113:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n114:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n115:       return 0d;\n116:     }\n117:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n118:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n119:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n120:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n121:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n122:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n123:     if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n124:       return isCall ? Math.max(forwardRate - strikeRate, 0d) : Math.max(0d, strikeRate - forwardRate);\n125:     }\n126:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n127:     return BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n128:   }\n129: \n130:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n131:   /**\n132:    * Calculates the delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n133:    * <p>\n134:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n135:    * \n136:    * @param option  the option product\n137:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n138:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n139:    * @return the delta of the product\n140:    */\n141:   public double delta(\n142:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n143:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n144:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n145: \n146:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n147:     double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n148:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n149:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n150:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n151:     return fwdDelta * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n152:   }\n153: \n154:   /**\n155:    * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n156:    * <p>\n157:    * The present value delta is the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n158:    * \n159:    * @param option  the option product\n160:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n161:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n162:    * @return the present value delta of the product\n163:    */\n164:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\n165:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n166:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n167:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n168: \n169:     double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n170:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * delta);\n171:   }\n172: \n173:   /**\n174:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n175:    * <p>\n176:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\n177:    * the underlying curves.\n178:    * <p>\n179:    * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n180:    * \n181:    * @param option  the option product\n182:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n183:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n184:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n185:    */\n186:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n187:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n188:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n189:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n190: \n191:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n192:       return PointSensitivities.empty();\n193:     }\n194:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n195:     double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n196:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n197:     double notional = signedNotional(option);\n198:     PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n199:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n200:         .multipliedBy(notional * discountFactor * fwdDelta);\n201:     double fwdPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n202:     PointSensitivityBuilder dscSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(option.getCounterCurrency())\n203:         .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlying.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(notional * fwdPrice);\n204:     return fwdSensi.combinedWith(dscSensi).build().convertedTo(option.getCounterCurrency(), ratesProvider);\n205:   }\n206: \n207:   // the delta without discounting\n208:   private double undiscountedDelta(\n209:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n210:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n211:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n212: \n213:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n214:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n215:       return 0d;\n216:     }\n217:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n218:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n219:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n220:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n221:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n222:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n223:     if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n224:       return isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n225:     }\n226:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n227:     return BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n228:   }\n229: \n230:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n231:   /**\n232:    * Calculates the smile adjusted delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n233:    * <p>\n234:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n235:    * The sensitivity of the volatility to spot is also included in this method,\n236:    * that is based on how FX option volatility surface is constructed in {@code BlackFxOptionVolatilities}.\n237:    *\n238:    * @param option  the option product\n239:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n240:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n241:    * @return the delta of the product\n242:    */\n243:   public double smileAdjustedDelta(\n244:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n245:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n246:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n247: \n248:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n249:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n250:       return 0d;\n251:     }\n252:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n253:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n254:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n255:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n256:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n257:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n258:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n259:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n260:         isCall ? underlying : underlying.inverse(),\n261:         ratesProvider);\n262:     if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n263:       double forwardDelta = isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n264:       return discountFactor * forwardDelta * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n265:     }\n266:     ValueDerivatives volatilityDerivatives = volatilities.firstPartialDerivatives(\n267:         strikePair,\n268:         timeToExpiry,\n269:         strikeRate,\n270:         forwardRate);\n271:     double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(\n272:         forwardRate,\n273:         strikeRate,\n274:         timeToExpiry,\n275:         volatilityDerivatives.getValue());\n276:     double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(\n277:         forwardRate,\n278:         strikeRate,\n279:         timeToExpiry,\n280:         volatilityDerivatives.getValue(),\n281:         isCall);\n282:     return (fwdDelta + fwdVega * volatilityDerivatives.getDerivative(2)) * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n283:   }\n284: \n285:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n286:   /**\n287:    * Calculates the gamma of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n288:    * <p>\n289:    * The gamma is the second derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n290:    * \n291:    * @param option  the option product\n292:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n293:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n294:    * @return the gamma of the product\n295:    */\n296:   public double gamma(\n297:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n298:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n299:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n300: \n301:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n302:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n303:       return 0d;\n304:     }\n305:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n306:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n307:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n308:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n309:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n310:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n311:         strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n312:     double forwardGamma = BlackFormulaRepository.gamma(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n313:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n314:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n315:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n316:     return forwardGamma * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n317:   }\n318: \n319:   /**\n320:    * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n321:    * <p>\n322:    * The present value gamma is the second derivative of the {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n323:    * \n324:    * @param option  the option product\n325:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n326:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n327:    * @return the present value gamma of the product\n328:    */\n329:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\n330:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n331:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n332:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n333: \n334:     double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n335:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * gamma);\n336:   }\n337: \n338:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n339:   /**\n340:    * Calculates the vega of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n341:    * <p>\n342:    * The vega is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to volatility.\n343:    * \n344:    * @param option  the option product\n345:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n346:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n347:    * @return the vega of the product\n348:    */\n349:   public double vega(\n350:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n351:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n352:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n353: \n354:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n355:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n356:       return 0d;\n357:     }\n358:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n359:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n360:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n361:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n362:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n363:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n364:     double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n365:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n366:     return discountFactor * fwdVega;\n367:   }\n368: \n369:   /**\n370:    * Calculates the present value vega of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n371:    * <p>\n372:    * The present value vega is the first derivative of the {@link #presentValue} with respect to volatility.\n373:    * \n374:    * @param option  the option product\n375:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n376:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n377:    * @return the present value vega of the product\n378:    */\n379:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueVega(\n380:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n381:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n382:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n383: \n384:     double vega = vega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n385:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * vega);\n386:   }\n387: \n388:   /**\n389:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n390:    * <p>\n391:    * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used.\n392:    * \n393:    * @param option  the option product\n394:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n395:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n396:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n397:    */\n398:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n399:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n400:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n401:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n402: \n403:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n404:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n405:     }\n406:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n407:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n408:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n409:     CurrencyAmount valueVega = presentValueVega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n410:     return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n411:         volatilities.getName(),\n412:         strikePair,\n413:         volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()),\n414:         option.getStrike(),\n415:         forward.fxRate(strikePair),\n416:         valueVega.getCurrency(),\n417:         valueVega.getAmount());\n418:   }\n419: \n420:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n421:   /**\n422:    * Calculates the Black theta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n423:    * <p>\n424:    * The theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to time parameter\n425:    * in Black formula (the discounted driftless theta).\n426:    * \n427:    * @param option  the option product\n428:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n429:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n430:    * @return the theta of the product\n431:    */\n432:   public double theta(\n433:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n434:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n435:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n436: \n437:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n438:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n439:       return 0d;\n440:     }\n441:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n442:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n443:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n444:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n445:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n446:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n447:         strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n448:     double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n449:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n450:     return discountFactor * fwdTheta;\n451:   }\n452: \n453:   /**\n454:    * Calculates the present value theta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n455:    * <p>\n456:    * The present value theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with time parameter\n457:    * in Black formula, i.e., the driftless theta of the present value.\n458:    * \n459:    * @param option  the option product\n460:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n461:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n462:    * @return the present value vega of the product\n463:    */\n464:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\n465:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n466:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n467:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n468: \n469:     double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n470:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * theta);\n471:   }\n472: \n473:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n474:   /**\n475:    * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n476:    *\n477:    * @param option  the option product\n478:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n479:    * @return the forward rate\n480:    */\n481:   public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n482:     return fxPricer.forwardFxRate(option.getUnderlying(), ratesProvider);\n483:   }\n484: \n485:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n486:   /**\n487:    * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n488:    * \n489:    * @param option  the option product\n490:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n491:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n492:    * @return the implied volatility of the product\n493:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n494:    */\n495:   public double impliedVolatility(\n496:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n497:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n498:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n499: \n500:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n501:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n502:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"valuation is after option's expiry.\");\n503:     }\n504:     FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\n505:     CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n506:     return volatilities.volatility(\n507:         strikePair, option.getExpiry(), option.getStrike(), forward.fxRate(strikePair));\n508:   }\n509: \n510:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n511:   /**\n512:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n513:    * \n514:    * @param option  the option product\n515:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n516:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n517:    * @return the currency exposure\n518:    */\n519:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n520:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n521:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n522:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n523: \n524:     double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n525:     return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n526:   }\n527: \n528:   /**\n529:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product, with smile adjustment included.\n530:    * <p>\n531:    * The smile adjustment is based on {@link BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer#smileAdjustedDelta}.\n532:    *\n533:    * @param option  the option product\n534:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n535:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n536:    * @return the currency exposure\n537:    */\n538:   public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n539:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n540:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n541:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n542: \n543:     double delta = smileAdjustedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n544:     return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n545:   }\n546: \n547:   private MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposureFromDelta(\n548:       double delta,\n549:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n550:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n551:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n552: \n553:     CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n554:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n555:     double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(strikePair);\n556:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n557:     CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n558:     CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n559:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n560:   }\n561: \n562:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n563:   // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n564:   private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option) {\n565:     return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n566:         Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n567:   }\n568: \n569: }\n570: volatility provider\n68:    * @return the present value of the trade\n69:    */\n70:   public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n71:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n72:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n73:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n74: \n75:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n76:     CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n77:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n78:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n79:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct).plus(pvPremium);\n80:   }\n81: \n82:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n83:   /**\n84: volatilities) {\n124: \n125:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n126:     return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n127:   }\n128: \n129:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n130:   /**\n131:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX vanilla @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n155:    * @return the currency exposure\n156:    */\n157:   public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n158: productPricer.smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n166:   }\n167: \n168: Castagna and F. Mercurio, Risk, 106-111, January 2007.\\n28:  * OG implementation: Vanna-volga method for Forex options, version 1.0, June 2012.\\n29:  */\\n30: public class VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer {\\n31: \\n32:   /**\\n33:    * Default implementation.\\n34:    */\\n35:   public static final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(\\n36:       DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\\n37: \\n38:   /**\\n39:    * Underlying FX pricer.\\n40:    */\\n41:   private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\\n42: \\n43:   /**\\n44:    * Creates an instance.\\n45:    * \\n46:    * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\\n47:    */\\n48:   public VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\\n49:     this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \\\"fxPricer\\\");\\n50:   }\\n51: \\n52:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n53:   /**\\n54:    * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n55:    * <p>\\n56:    * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \\n57:    * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\\n58:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\\n59:    * \\n60:    * @param option  the option product\\n61:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n62:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n63:    * @return the price of the product\\n64:    */\\n65:   public double price(\\n66:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n67:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n68:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n69: \\n70:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n71:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n72:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n73:       return 0d;\\n74:     }\\n75:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n76:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n77:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n78:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n79:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n80:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n81:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n82:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n83:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n84:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n85:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n86:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n87:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n88:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n89:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n90:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n91:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n92:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\\n93:     }\\n94:     return df * priceFwd;\\n95:   }\\n96: \\n97:   /**\\n98:    * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n99:    * <p>\\n100:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\\n101:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\\n102:    * \\n103:    * @param option  the option product\\n104:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n105:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n106:    * @return the present value of the product\\n107:    */\\n108:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n109:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n110:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n111:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n112: \\n113:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n114:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\\n115:   }\\n116: \\n117:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n118:   /**\\n119:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n120:    * <p>\\n121:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\\n122:    * the underlying curves.\\n123:    * <p>\\n124:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\\n125:    * \\n126:    * @param option  the option product\\n127:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n128:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n129:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\\n130:    */\\n131:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n132:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n133:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n134:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n135: \\n136:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n137:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n138:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n139:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n140:     }\\n141:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n142:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n143:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n144:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n145:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n146:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n147:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n148:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n149:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n150:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n151:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n152:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n153:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n154:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n155:     double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n156:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n157:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n158:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n159:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\\n160:       double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n161:       double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n162:       deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\\n163:     }\\n164:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\\n165:     PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter)\\n166:         .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(priceFwd * signedNotional);\\n167:     PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\\n168:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider)\\n169:         .multipliedBy(df * deltaFwd * signedNotional);\\n170:     return dfSensi.combinedWith(fwdSensi);\\n171:   }\\n172: \\n173:   /**\\n174:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatilities used in the pricing.\\n175:    * <p>\\n176:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\\n177:    * \\n178:    * @param option  the option product\\n179:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n180:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n181:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n182:    */\\n183:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\\n184:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n185:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n186:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n187: \\n188:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n189:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n190:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n191:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n192:     }\\n193:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n194:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n195:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n196:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n197:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n198:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n199:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n200:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n201:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n202:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n203:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n204:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n205:     double vegaAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm);\\n206:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\\n207:     PointSensitivityBuilder sensiSmile = PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n208:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n209:       double vegaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm);\\n210:       vegaAtm -= x[i] * vegaFwdAtm;\\n211:       double vegaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i]);\\n212:       sensiSmile = sensiSmile.combinedWith(\\n213:           FxOptionSensitivity.of(\\n214:               volatilities.getName(),\\n215:               currencyPair,\\n216:               timeToExpiry,\\n217:               strikes[i],\\n218:               forwardRate,\\n219:               ccyCounter,\\n220:               df * signedNotional * x[i] * vegaFwdSmile));\\n221:     }\\n222:     FxOptionSensitivity sensiAtm = FxOptionSensitivity.of(\\n223:         volatilities.getName(),\\n224:         currencyPair,\\n225:         timeToExpiry,\\n226:         strikes[1],\\n227:         forwardRate,\\n228:         ccyCounter,\\n229:         df * signedNotional * vegaAtm);\\n230:     return sensiAtm.combinedWith(sensiSmile);\\n231:   }\\n232: \\n233:   /**\\n234:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n235:    * \\n236:    * @param option  the option product\\n237:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n238:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n239:    * @return the currency exposure\\n240:    */\\n241:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\\n242:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n243:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n244:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n245: \\n246:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n247:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n248:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n249:       return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\\n250:     }\\n251:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n252:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n253:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n254:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n255:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n256:     double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n257:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n258:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\\n259:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider);\\n260:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n261:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n262:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n263:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n264:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n265:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n266:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n267:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n268:     double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n269:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n270:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n271:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n272:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\\n273:       double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n274:       double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n275:       deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\\n276:     }\\n277:     double price = df * priceFwd;\\n278:     double delta = df * deltaFwd * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\\n279:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\\n280:     CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\\n281:     CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\\n282:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\\n283:   }\\n284: \\n285:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n286:   // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\\n287:   private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option) {\\n288:     return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\\n289:         Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n290:   }\\n291: \\n292:   private double[] vannaVolgaWeights(\\n293:       double forward,\\n294:       double strike,\\n295:       double timeToExpiry,\\n296:       double volATM,\\n297:       double[] strikesReference) {\\n298: \\n299:     double lnk21 = Math.log(strikesReference[1] / strikesReference[0]);\\n300:     double lnk31 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[0]);\\n301:     double lnk32 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[1]);\\n302:     double[] lnk = new double[3];\\n303:     for (int loopvv = 0; loopvv < 3; loopvv++) {\\n304:       lnk[loopvv] = Math.log(strikesReference[loopvv] / strike);\\n305:     }\\n306:     double[] x = new double[3];\\n307:     double vega0 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[0], timeToExpiry, volATM);\\n308:     double vegaFlat = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volATM);\\n309:     double vega2 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[2], timeToExpiry, volATM);\\n310:     x[0] = vegaFlat * lnk[1] * lnk[2] / (vega0 * lnk21 * lnk31);\\n311:     x[2] = vegaFlat * lnk[0] * lnk[1] / (vega2 * lnk31 * lnk32);\\n312:     return x;\\n313:   }\\n314: \\n315:   private void validate(RatesProvider ratesProvider, BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n316:     ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate().equals(ratesProvider.getValuationDate()),\\n317:         \\\"volatility and rate data must be for the same date\\\");\\n318:     ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getSmile().getStrikeCount() == 3, \\\"the number of data points must be 3\\\");\\n319:   }\\n320: }\\n321: com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n10: import /**\\n22:  * Pricing method for vanilla Forex option transactions with Vanna-Volga method.\\n23:  * <p>\\n24:  * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}. \\n25:  * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\\n26:  * <p>\\n27:  * Reference: The vanna-volga method for implied volatilities (2007), A. Castagna and F. Mercurio, Risk, 106-111, January 2007.\\n28:  * OG implementation: Vanna-volga method for Forex options, version 1.0, June 2012.\\n29:  */\\n30: public class VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer {\\n31: \\n32:   /**\\n33:    * Default implementation.\\n34:    */\\n35:   public static final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(\\n36:       DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\\n37: \\n38:   /**\\n39:    * Underlying FX pricer.\\n40:    */\\n41:   private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\\n42: \\n43:   /**\\n44:    * Creates an instance.\\n45:    * \\n46:    * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\\n47:    */\\n48:   public VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\\n49:     this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \\\"fxPricer\\\");\\n50:   }\\n51: \\n52:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n53:   /**\\n54:    * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n55:    * <p>\\n56:    * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \\n57:    * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\\n58:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\\n59:    * \\n60:    * @param option  the option product\\n61:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n62:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n63:    * @return the price of the product\\n64:    */\\n65:   public double price(\\n66:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n67:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n68:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n69: \\n70:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n71:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n72:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n73:       return 0d;\\n74:     }\\n75:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n76:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n77:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n78:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n79:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n80:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n81:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n82:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n83:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n84:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n85:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n86:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n87:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n88:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n89:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n90:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n91:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n92:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\\n93:     }\\n94:     return df * priceFwd;\\n95:   }\\n96: \\n97:   /**\\n98:    * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n99:    * <p>\\n100:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\\n101:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\\n102:    * \\n103:    * @param option  the option product\\n104:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n105:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n106:    * @return the present value of the product\\n107:    */\\n108:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n109:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n110:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n111:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n112: \\n113:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n114:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\\n115:   }\\n116: \\n117:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n118:   /**\\n119:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n120:    * <p>\\n121:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\\n122:    * the underlying curves.\\n123:    * <p>\\n124:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\\n125:    * \\n126:    * @param option  the option product\\n127:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n128:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n129:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\\n130:    */\\n131:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n132:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n133:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n134:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n135: \\n136:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n137:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n138:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n139:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n140:     }\\n141:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n142:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n143:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n144:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n145:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n146:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n147:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n148:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n149:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n150:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n151:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n152:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n153:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n154:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n155:     double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n156:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n157:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n158:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n159:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\\n160:       double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n161:       double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n162:       deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\\n163:     }\\n164:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\\n165:     PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter)\\n166:         .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(priceFwd * signedNotional);\\n167:     PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\\n168:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider)\\n169:         .multipliedBy(df * deltaFwd * signedNotional);\\n170:     return dfSensi.combinedWith(fwdSensi);\\n171:   }\\n172: \\n173:   /**\\n174:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatilities used in the pricing.\\n175:    * <p>\\n176:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\\n177:    * \\n178:    * @param option  the option product\\n179:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n180:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n181:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n182:    */\\n183:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\\n184:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n185:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n186:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n187: \\n188:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n189:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n190:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n191:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n192:     }\\n193:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n194:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n195:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n196:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n197:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n198:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n199:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n200:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n201:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n202:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n203:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n204:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n205:     double vegaAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm);\\n206:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\\n207:     PointSensitivityBuilder sensiSmile = PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n208:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n209:       double vegaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm);\\n210:       vegaAtm -= x[i] * vegaFwdAtm;\\n211:       double     volatilities.getName(),\\n215:               currencyPair,\\n216:               timeToExpiry,\\n217:               strikes[i],\\n218:               forwardRate,\\n219:               ccyCounter,\\n220:               df * signedNotional * x[i] * vegaFwdSmile));\\n221:     }\\n222:     FxOptionSensitivity sensiAtm = FxOptionSensitivity.of(\\n223:         volatilities.getName(),\\n224:         currencyPair,\\n225:         timeToExpiry,\\n226:         strikes[1],\\n227:         forwardRate,\\n228:         ccyCounter,\\n229:         df * signedNotional * vegaAtm);\\n230:     return sensiAtm.combinedWith(sensiSmile);\\n231:   }\\n232: \\n233:   /**\\n234:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n235:    * BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n245: \\n246:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n247:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n248:     if The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\n58:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\n59:    * \n60:    * @param option  the option product\n61:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n62:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n63:    * @return the price of the product\n64:    */\n65:   public double price(\n66:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n67:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n68:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n69: \n70:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n71:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n72:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n73:       return 0d;\n74:     }\n75:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n76:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n77:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n78:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n79:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n80:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n81:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n82:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n83:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n84:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n85:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n86:     double volAtm = vols[1];\n87:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n88:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n89:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n90:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n91:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n92:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n93:     }\n94:     return df * priceFwd;\n95:   }\n96: \n97:   /**\n98:    * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n99:    * <p>\n100:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\n101:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\n102:    * \n103:    * @param option  the option product\n104:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n105:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n106:    * @return the present value of the product\n107:    */\n108:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n109:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n110:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n111:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n112: \n113:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n114:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n115:   }\n116: \n117:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n118:   /**\n119:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n120:    * <p>\n121:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\n122:    * the underlying curves.\n123:    * <p>\n124:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n125:    * \n126:    * @param option  the product\n130:    */\n131:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n132:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n133:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n134:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n135: \n136:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n137:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n138:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n139:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n140:     }\n141:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n142:     Currency ccyCounter = ratesProvider);\n145:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n146:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n147:     double strikeRate = strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n151:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n152:     double volAtm = vols[1];\n153:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n154:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n155:     double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n156:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n157:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n158:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n159:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n160:       double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n161:       double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n162:       deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\n163:     }\n164:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n165:     PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter)\n166:         .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(priceFwd * signedNotional);\n167:     PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n168:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n169:         .multipliedBy(df * deltaFwd * signedNotional);\n170:     return dfSensi.combinedWith(fwdSensi);\n171:   }\n172: \n173:   /**\n174:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatilities used in the pricing.\n175:    * <p>\n176:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n177:    * \n178:    * @param option  the option product\n179:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n180:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n181:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n182:    */\n183:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n184:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n185:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n186:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n187: \n188:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n189:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n190:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n191:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n192:     }\n193:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n205:     double vegaAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm);\n206:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n207:     PointSensitivityBuilder sensiSmile = PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n208:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n209:       double vegaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm);\n210:       vegaAtm -= x[i] * vegaFwdAtm;\n211:       double vegaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i]);\n212:       sensiSmile = sensiSmile.combinedWith(\n213:           FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n214:               volatilities.getName(),\n215:               currencyPair,\n216:               timeToExpiry,\n217:               strikes[i],\n218:               forwardRate,\n219:               ccyCounter,\n220:               df * signedNotional * x[i] * strikes[1],\n227:         forwardRate,\n228:         ccyCounter,\n229:         df * signedNotional * vegaAtm);\n230:     return sensiAtm.combinedWith(sensiSmile);\n231:   }\n232: \n233:   /**\n234:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n235:    * \n236:    * @param option  the option product\n237:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n238:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n239:    * @return the currency exposure\n240:    */\n241:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n242:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n243:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n244:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n245: \n246:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n247:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n248:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n249:       return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\n250:     }\n251:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n260:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n261:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n262:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n263:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n264:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n265:     double volAtm = vols[1];\n266:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n267:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n268:     double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n269:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n270:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n271:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n272:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n273:       double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n274:       double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n275:       deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\n276:     }\n277:     double price = df * priceFwd;\n278:     double delta = df * deltaFwd * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n279:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n280:     CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n281:     CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n282:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n283:   }\n284: \n285:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n286:   // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n287:   private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option) {\n288:     return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n289:         Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n290:   }\n291: \n292:   private double[] vannaVolgaWeights(\n293:       double forward,\n294:       double strike,\n295:       double timeToExpiry,\n296:       double volATM,\n297:       double[] strikesReference) {\n298: \n299:     double lnk21 = Math.log(strikesReference[1] / strikesReference[0]);\n300:     double lnk31 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[0]);\n301:     double lnk32 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[1]);\n302:     double[] lnk = new double[3];\n303:     for (int loopvv = 0; loopvv < 3; loopvv++) {\n304:       lnk[loopvv] = Math.log(strikesReference[loopvv] / strike);\n305:     }\n306:     double[] x = new double[3];\n307:     double vega0 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[0], timeToExpiry, volATM);\n308:     double vegaFlat = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volATM);\n309:     double vega2 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[2], timeToExpiry, volATM);\n310:     x[0] = vegaFlat * lnk[1] * lnk[2] / (vega0 * lnk21 * lnk31);\n311:     x[2] = vegaFlat * lnk[0] * lnk[1] / (vega2 * lnk31 * lnk32);\n312:     return x;\n313:   }\n314: \n315:   private void validate(RatesProvider ratesProvider, BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n316:     ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate().equals(ratesProvider.getValuationDate()),\n317:         \"volatility and rate data must be for the same date\");\n318:     ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getSmile().getStrikeCount() == 3, \"the number of data points must be 3\");\n319:   }\n320: }\n321: VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n46:   /**\n47:    * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n48:    */\n49:   private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = It provides the link between the\\n32:  * data that the function needs and the data that is available in {@link ScenarioMarketData}.\\n33:  * <p>\\n34:  * Implementations of this interface must be immutable.\\n35:  */\\n36: public enum FxVanillaOptionMethod implements NamedEnum, CalculationParameter {\\n37: \\n38:   /**\\n39:    * The Black (lognormal) model.\\n40:    * This uses Black com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\n31: \n32: /**\n33:  * Perform calculations on an FX vanilla option trade for each of a set of scenarios.\n34:  * <p>\n35:  * This uses Black FX option volatilities, which must be specified using {@link FxOptionMarketDataLookup}.\n36:  * An instance of {@link RatesMarketDataLookup} must also be specified.\n37:  * <p>\n38:  * Two pricing methods are available, 'Black' and 'VannaVolga'.\n39:  * By default, 'Black' will be used. To control the method, pass an instance of\n40:  * {@link FxVanillaOptionMethod} in the calculation parameters.\n41:  * <p>\n42:  * The supported built-in measures are:\n43:  * <ul>\n44:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n45:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\n46:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\n47:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\n48:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\n49:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\n50:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}\n51:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED Vega market quote bucketed on volatility curves/surfaces}\n52:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n53:  * </ul>\n54:  * <p>\n55:  * The \"natural\" currency is the market convention base currency of the underlying FX.\n56:  */\n57: public class FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction\n58: .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedSum)\n67:           .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed)\n68:           .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum)\n69:           .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed)\n70:           .put(Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currencyExposure)\n71:           .put(Measures.OPTION_DELTA, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::delta)\n72:           .put(Measures.CURRENT_CASH, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currentCash)\n73:           .put(Measures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::vegaMarketQuoteBucketed)\n74:           .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, m, meth) -> rt)\n75:           .build();\n76: \n77:   private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n78: \n79:   /**\n80:    * Creates an instance.\n81:    */\n82:   public FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction() {\n83:   }\n84: \n85:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n86:   @Override\n87:   public Class<FxVanillaOptionTrade> targetType() {\n88:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.class;\n89:   }\n90: \n91:   @Override\n92:   public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n93: }\n100: \n101:   @Override\n102:   public Currency naturalCurrency(FxVanillaOptionTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n103:     return trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair().getBase();\n104:   }\n105: \n106:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n107:   @Override\n108:   public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n109:       FxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n110:       Set<Measure> measures,\n111:       CalculationParameters parameters,\n112:       ReferenceData refData) {\n113: \n114:     // extract data from product\n115:     FxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n116:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n117: \n118:     // use lookup to build requirements\n119:     RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = \\n43:   /**\\n44:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\\n45:    */\\n46:   private final FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations calc;\\n47: \\n48:   /**\\n49:    * Creates an data\\n69:    * @param marketData  the market data\\n70:    * @param method  the pricing method\\n71:    * @return the present value, one entry per scenario\\n72:    */\\n73:   public volatilities,\\n100:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n101: \\n102:     return calc.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\\n103:   }\\n104: \\n105:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n106:   /**\\n107:    * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\\n108:    * <p>\\n109:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\\n110:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\\n111:    * \\n112:    * @param parseRow(row, info);\n128:       return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\n129:     }\n130:     FxSingleTrade singleTrade = FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parseRow(row, info);\n131:     FxVanillaOptionTrade .expiryDate(expiryDate)\n145:         .expiryTime(expiryTime)\n146:         .expiryZone(expiryZone)\n147:         .underlying(underlying)\n148:         .build();\n149:     return .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n154:         .build();\n155:   }\n156: \n157:   // parse the trade from the currency pairs, base currency notional, LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n161:     LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\n162:     ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\n163:     PutCall putCall = row.getValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parsePutCall);\n164:     Currency ccy1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n165:     Currency ccy2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n166:     LocalDate paymentDate = row.getValue(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n167:     double notional1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n168: \n169:     double strike = parseStrike(row, notional1);\n170: \n171:     Optional<BusinessDayAdjustment> paymentAdj = CsvLoaderUtils\n172:         .parseBusinessDayAdjustment(row, PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD)\n173:         .filter(adj -> !adj.equals(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE));\n174: \n175:     ZonedDateTime expiry = expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n176:     CurrencyPair ccyPair = CurrencyPair.of(ccy1, ccy2);\n177:     FxVanillaOption option = paymentAdj\n178:         .map(adj -> FxVanillaOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate, adj))\n179:         .orElseGet(() -> FxVanillaOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate));\n180:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\n181:         .info(info)\n182:         .product(option)\n183:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n184:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n185:         .build();\n186:   }\n187: \n188:   private static double parseStrike(CsvRow row, double notional1) {\n189:     Optional<Double> strikeOpt = row.findValue(STRIKE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n190:     if (strikeOpt.isPresent()) {\n191:       return strikeOpt.get();\n192:     } else {\n193:       double notional2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n194:       return Math.abs(notional2 / notional1);\n195:     }\n196:   }\n197: \n198:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n199:   @Override\n200:   public Set<String> headers(List<FxVanillaOptionTrade> trades) {\n201:     return HEADERS;\n202:   }\n203: \n204:   @Override\n205:   public void writeCsv(CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, underlying = product.getUnderlying();\n214:     PutCall putCall = underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n215:     double strike = Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n216:         underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n217:     csv.writeCell(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, product.getLongShort());\n218:     csv.writeCell(PUT_CALL_FIELD, putCall);\n219:     csv.writeCell(STRIKE_FIELD, strike);\n220:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, product.getExpiryDate());\n221:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, product.getExpiryTime());\n222:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, product.getExpiryZone());\n223:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n224:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, Math.abs(underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount()));\n225:     csv.writeCell(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n226:     csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getDate());\n227:     underlying.getPaymentDateAdjustment().ifPresent(bda -> {\n228:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD, bda.getCalendar());\n229:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, bda.getConvention());\n230:     });\n231:   }\n232: \n233:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n234:   // Restricted constructor.\n235:   private FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n236:   }\n237: \n238: }\n239: ","url":"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java"}}}
