The\n * option is European, exercised only on the exercise date.\n * <p>\n * For example, a call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange is the option to perform a foreign exchange on the expiry\n * date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxEuropeanOption\n    implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxEuropeanOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the option is long or short.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; the short party will, at the option of\n   * the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LongShort longShort;\n  /**\n   * The expiry date of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalDate expiryDate;\n  /**\n   * The expiry time of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time is related to the expiry date and time-zone.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalTime expiryTime;\n  /**\n   * The time-zone of the expiry time.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time-zone is related to the expiry date and time.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ZoneId expiryZone;\n  /**\n   * The underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final FxSingle underlying;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an equivalent {@code FxEuropeanOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n   * currency notional, and underlying payment date.\n   * <p>\n   * No payment date adjustments apply.\n   *\n   * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n   * @param expiry the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate) {\n\n    return of(longShort, expiry, currencyPair, putCall, strike, baseNotional, paymentDate, null);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an equivalent {@code FxEuropeanOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n   * currency notional, underlying payment date, and payment date adjustment.\n   *\n   * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n   * @param expiry the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @param paymentDateAdjustment the adjustment to apply to the payment date\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate,\n      BusinessDayAdjustment paymentDateAdjustment) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(baseNotional > 0, \"Base notional must be positive\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(strike > 0, \"FX strike must be positive\");\n\n    // for a european call, will be long the base currency and short the counter currency\n    // for a european put, will be short the base currency and long the counter currency\n    double baseAmount = putCall.isCall() ? baseNotional : -baseNotional;\n    double counterNotional = strike * baseNotional;\n    double counterAmount = putCall.isCall() ? -counterNotional : counterNotional;\n    CurrencyAmount baseCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), baseAmount);\n    CurrencyAmount counterCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), counterAmount);\n    FxSingle equivalentUnderlying = paymentDateAdjustment == null ?\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate) :\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate, paymentDateAdjustment);\n\n    return FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiryDate(expiry.toLocalDate())\n        .expiryTime(expiry.toLocalTime())\n        .expiryZone(expiry.getZone())\n        .underlying(equivalentUnderlying)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    inOrderOrEqual(expiryDate, underlying.getPaymentDate(), \"expiryDate\", \"underlying.paymentDate\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  /**\n   * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n   *\n   * @return the currency pair\n   */\n  @Override\n  public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n    return underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry date-time.\n   * <p>\n   * The option expires at this date and time.\n   * <p>\n   * The result is returned by combining the expiry date, time and time-zone.\n   *\n   * @return the expiry date and time\n   */\n  @Override\n  public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n    return expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOption resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiry(getExpiry())\n        .underlying(underlying.resolve(refData))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n expiryTime,\n      ZoneId expiryZone,\n      FxSingle underlying) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(longShort, \"longShort\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryDate, \"expiryDate\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryTime, \"expiryTime\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryZone, \"expiryZone\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlying, \"underlying\");\n    this.longShort = longShort;\n baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @param paymentDateAdjustment the adjustment to apply to the payment date\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair : -baseNotional;\n    double counterNotional = strike * baseNotional;\n    double counterAmount = putCall.isCall() ? -counterNotional : counterNotional;\n    CurrencyAmount baseCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), baseAmount);\n    CurrencyAmount counterCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), counterAmount);\n    FxSingle equivalentUnderlying = paymentDateAdjustment == null ?\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate) :\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate, paymentDateAdjustment);\n\n    return FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiryDate(expiry.toLocalDate())\n        .expiryTime(expiry.toLocalTime())\n        .expiryZone(expiry.getZone())\n        .underlying(equivalentUnderlying)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n The\n * option is European, exercised only on the exercise date.\n * <p>\n * For example, a call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange is the option to perform a foreign exchange on the expiry\n * date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxEuropeanOption\n    implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxEuropeanOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the option is long or short.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; the short party will, at the option of\n   * the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LongShort longShort;\n  /**\n   * The expiry date of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalDate expiryDate;\n  /**\n   * The expiry time of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time is related to the expiry date and time-zone.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalTime the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate) {\n\n    return of(longShort, expiry, currencyPair, putCall, strike, baseNotional, paymentDate, null);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an equivalent {@code FxEuropeanOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n   * currency notional, underlying payment date, and payment date adjustment.\n   *\n   * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n   * @param expiry the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @param paymentDateAdjustment the adjustment to apply to the payment date\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate,\n      BusinessDayAdjustment paymentDateAdjustment) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(baseNotional > 0, \"Base notional must be positive\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(strike > 0, \"FX strike must be positive\");\n\n    double baseAmount = putCall.isCall() ? baseNotional : -baseNotional;\n    double counterNotional = strike * baseNotional;\n    double counterAmount = putCall.isCall() ? -counterNotional : counterNotional;\n    CurrencyAmount baseCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), baseAmount);\n    CurrencyAmount counterCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), counterAmount);\n    FxSingle equivalentUnderlying = paymentDateAdjustment == null ?\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate) :\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate, paymentDateAdjustment);\n\n    return FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiryDate(expiry.toLocalDate())\n        .expiryTime(expiry.toLocalTime())\n        .expiryZone(expiry.getZone())\n        .underlying(equivalentUnderlying)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    inOrderOrEqual(expiryDate, underlying.getPaymentDate(), \"expiryDate\", \"underlying.paymentDate\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  /**\n   * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This currency pair is {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01NcR5nDrJ2MuvgvTaWZK6zE","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01GrLwatguiKyYv92yBKPENT","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java","content":"/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for foreign exchange European option transaction products with a lognormal model.\n * <p>\n * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}.\n * <p>\n * All of the computation is be based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n */\npublic class BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer DEFAULT =\n      new BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Underlying FX pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\n   */\n  public BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(\n      DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\n    this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \"fxPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns the pricer used to price the underlying FX product.\n   *\n   * @return the pricer\n   */\n  DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer getDiscountingFxSingleProductPricer() {\n    return fxPricer;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the price of the product\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double forwardPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * forwardPrice;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n  }\n\n  // the price without discounting\n  private double undiscountedPrice(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      return isCall ? Math.max(forwardRate - strikeRate, 0d) : Math.max(0d, strikeRate - forwardRate);\n    }\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    return BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    return fwdDelta * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value delta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * delta);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivities.empty();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double notional = signedNotional(option);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n        .multipliedBy(notional * discountFactor * fwdDelta);\n    double fwdPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder dscSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(option.getCounterCurrency())\n        .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlying.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(notional * fwdPrice);\n    return fwdSensi.combinedWith(dscSensi).build().convertedTo(option.getCounterCurrency(), ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  // the delta without discounting\n  private double undiscountedDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      return isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n    }\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    return BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the smile adjusted delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double smileAdjustedDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        isCall ? underlying : underlying.inverse(),\n        ratesProvider);\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      double forwardDelta = isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n      return discountFactor * forwardDelta * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives volatilityDerivatives = volatilities.firstPartialDerivatives(\n        strikePair,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        strikeRate,\n        forwardRate);\n    double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(\n        forwardRate,\n        strikeRate,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        volatilityDerivatives.getValue());\n    double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(\n        forwardRate,\n        strikeRate,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        volatilityDerivatives.getValue(),\n        isCall);\n    return (fwdDelta + fwdVega * volatilityDerivatives.getDerivative(2)) * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the gamma of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the gamma of the product\n   */\n  public double gamma(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double forwardGamma = BlackFormulaRepository.gamma(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    return forwardGamma * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value gamma of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value gamma of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * gamma);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the vega of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the vega of the product\n   */\n  public double vega(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * fwdVega;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value vega of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value vega of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueVega(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double vega = vega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * vega);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    CurrencyAmount valueVega = presentValueVega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n        volatilities.getName(),\n        strikePair,\n        volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()),\n        option.getStrike(),\n        forward.fxRate(strikePair),\n        valueVega.getCurrency(),\n        valueVega.getAmount());\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the Black theta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the theta of the product\n   */\n  public double theta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * fwdTheta;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value theta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value theta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * theta);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the forward rate\n   */\n  public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    return fxPricer.forwardFxRate(option.getUnderlying(), ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the implied volatility of the product\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n   */\n  public double impliedVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"valuation is after option's expiry.\");\n    }\n    FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n    return volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), option.getStrike(), forward.fxRate(strikePair));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product, with smile adjustment included.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = smileAdjustedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  private MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposureFromDelta(\n      double delta,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n    CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n  private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option) {\n    return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n        Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3638,"cache_read_input_tokens":140346,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3638,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"be957b90-95e8-4a02-b8be-d45be4c491f7","uuid":"cfd7ede1-5390-4ec8-b2b3-2a8adf639344"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GrLwatguiKyYv92yBKPENT","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for foreign exchange European option transaction products with a lognormal model.\n * <p>\n * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}.\n * <p>\n * All of the computation is be based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n */\npublic class BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer DEFAULT =\n      new BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Underlying FX pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\n   */\n  public BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(\n      DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\n    this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \"fxPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns the pricer used to price the underlying FX product.\n   *\n   * @return the pricer\n   */\n  DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer getDiscountingFxSingleProductPricer() {\n    return fxPricer;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the price of the product\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double forwardPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * forwardPrice;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n  }\n\n  // the price without discounting\n  private double undiscountedPrice(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      return isCall ? Math.max(forwardRate - strikeRate, 0d) : Math.max(0d, strikeRate - forwardRate);\n    }\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    return BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    return fwdDelta * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value delta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * delta);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivities.empty();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double notional = signedNotional(option);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n        .multipliedBy(notional * discountFactor * fwdDelta);\n    double fwdPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder dscSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(option.getCounterCurrency())\n        .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlying.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(notional * fwdPrice);\n    return fwdSensi.combinedWith(dscSensi).build().convertedTo(option.getCounterCurrency(), ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  // the delta without discounting\n  private double undiscountedDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      return isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n    }\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    return BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the smile adjusted delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double smileAdjustedDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        isCall ? underlying : underlying.inverse(),\n        ratesProvider);\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      double forwardDelta = isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n      return discountFactor * forwardDelta * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives volatilityDerivatives = volatilities.firstPartialDerivatives(\n        strikePair,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        strikeRate,\n        forwardRate);\n    double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(\n        forwardRate,\n        strikeRate,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        volatilityDerivatives.getValue());\n    double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(\n        forwardRate,\n        strikeRate,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        volatilityDerivatives.getValue(),\n        isCall);\n    return (fwdDelta + fwdVega * volatilityDerivatives.getDerivative(2)) * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the gamma of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the gamma of the product\n   */\n  public double gamma(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double forwardGamma = BlackFormulaRepository.gamma(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    return forwardGamma * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value gamma of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value gamma of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * gamma);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the vega of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the vega of the product\n   */\n  public double vega(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * fwdVega;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value vega of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value vega of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueVega(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double vega = vega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * vega);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    CurrencyAmount valueVega = presentValueVega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n        volatilities.getName(),\n        strikePair,\n        volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()),\n        option.getStrike(),\n        forward.fxRate(strikePair),\n        valueVega.getCurrency(),\n        valueVega.getAmount());\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the Black theta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the theta of the product\n   */\n  public double theta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * fwdTheta;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value theta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value theta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * theta);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the forward rate\n   */\n  public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    return fxPricer.forwardFxRate(option.getUnderlying(), ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the implied volatility of the product\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n   */\n  public double impliedVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"valuation is after option's expiry.\");\n    }\n    FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n    return volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), option.getStrike(), forward.fxRate(strikePair));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product, with smile adjustment included.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = smileAdjustedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  private MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposureFromDelta(\n      double delta,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n    CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n  private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option) {\n    return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n        Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

model.\n * <p>\n * This function provides the ability to price an {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n */\npublic class BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  private final BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}\n   * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\n   */\n  public BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\n    this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \"productPricer\");\n    this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \"paymentPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\n        productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.currencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the smile adjusted currency exposure of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the delta of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.delta(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the current cash of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n   * @return the current cash amount\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount currentCash(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, LocalDate valuationDate) {\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    if (premium.getDate().equals(valuationDate)) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), premium.getAmount());\n    }\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), 0d);\n  }\n\n the rates provider\n   * @return the forward rate\n   */\n  public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product =
