{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01UtSfffsaCRTwV6em4iPq77","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01E7pimfmhxDdWS7D5dKWxDd","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java","content":"/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\n\n/**\n * Pricing method for Forex European option transactions with Vanna-Volga method.\n * <p>\n * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}.\n * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\n * <p>\n * Reference: The vanna-volga method for implied volatilities (2007), A. Castagna and F. Mercurio, Risk, 106-111, January 2007.\n * OG implementation: Vanna-volga method for Forex options, version 1.0, June 2012.\n */\npublic class VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(\n      DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Underlying FX pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\n   */\n  public VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\n    this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \"fxPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the price of the product\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n    Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n    double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n    double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n    double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n    double volAtm = vols[1];\n    double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n    double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n      double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n    }\n    return df * priceFwd;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n    Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n    double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n    double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n    double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n    double volAtm = vols[1];\n    double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n    double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n      double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n      double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\n    }\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter)\n        .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(priceFwd * signedNotional);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n        .multipliedBy(df * deltaFwd * signedNotional);\n    return dfSensi.combinedWith(fwdSensi);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatilities used in the pricing.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n    Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n    double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n    double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n    double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n    double volAtm = vols[1];\n    double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n    double vegaAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder sensiSmile = PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n      double vegaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm);\n      vegaAtm -= x[i] * vegaFwdAtm;\n      double vegaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i]);\n      sensiSmile = sensiSmile.combinedWith(\n          FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n              volatilities.getName(),\n              currencyPair,\n              timeToExpiry,\n              strikes[i],\n              forwardRate,\n              ccyCounter,\n              df * signedNotional * x[i] * vegaFwdSmile));\n    }\n    FxOptionSensitivity sensiAtm = FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n        volatilities.getName(),\n        currencyPair,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        strikes[1],\n        forwardRate,\n        ccyCounter,\n        df * signedNotional * vegaAtm);\n    return sensiAtm.combinedWith(sensiSmile);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n    Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n    double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n    double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n    double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n    double volAtm = vols[1];\n    double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n    double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n      double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n      double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\n    }\n    double price = df * priceFwd;\n    double delta = df * deltaFwd * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n    CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n  private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option) {\n    return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n        Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n  private double[] vannaVolgaWeights(\n      double forward,\n      double strike,\n      double timeToExpiry,\n      double volATM,\n      double[] strikesReference) {\n\n    double lnk21 = Math.log(strikesReference[1] / strikesReference[0]);\n    double lnk31 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[0]);\n    double lnk32 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[1]);\n    double[] lnk = new double[3];\n    for (int loopvv = 0; loopvv < 3; loopvv++) {\n      lnk[loopvv] = Math.log(strikesReference[loopvv] / strike);\n    }\n    double[] x = new double[3];\n    double vega0 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[0], timeToExpiry, volATM);\n    double vegaFlat = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volATM);\n    double vega2 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[2], timeToExpiry, volATM);\n    x[0] = vegaFlat * lnk[1] * lnk[2] / (vega0 * lnk21 * lnk31);\n    x[2] = vegaFlat * lnk[0] * lnk[1] / (vega2 * lnk31 * lnk32);\n    return x;\n  }\n\n  private void validate(RatesProvider ratesProvider, BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate().equals(ratesProvider.getValuationDate()),\n        \"volatility and rate data must be for the same date\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getSmile().getStrikeCount() == 3, \"the number of data points must be 3\");\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2673,"cache_read_input_tokens":150624,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2673,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":18,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"be957b90-95e8-4a02-b8be-d45be4c491f7","uuid":"7804caa4-5463-4583-af25-c27acd0d4d27"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01E7pimfmhxDdWS7D5dKWxDd","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"be957b90-95e8-4a02-b8be-d45be4c491f7","uuid":"b4c94ae6-caac-46fd-bee4-072edc44d2fc","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java","content":"/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\n\n/**\n * Pricing method for Forex European option transactions with Vanna-Volga method.\n * <p>\n * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}.\n * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\n * <p>\n * Reference: The vanna-volga method for implied volatilities (2007), A. Castagna and F. Mercurio, Risk, 106-111, January 2007.\n * OG implementation: Vanna-volga method for Forex options, version 1.0, June 2012.\n */\npublic class VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(\n      DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Underlying FX pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\n   */\n  public VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\n    this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \"fxPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the price of the product\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n    Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n    double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n    double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n    double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n    double volAtm = vols[1];\n    double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n    double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n      double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n    }\n    return df * priceFwd;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n    Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n    double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n    double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n    double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n    double volAtm = vols[1];\n    double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n    double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n      double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n      double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\n    }\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter)\n        .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(priceFwd * signedNotional);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n        .multipliedBy(df * deltaFwd * signedNotional);\n    return dfSensi.combinedWith(fwdSensi);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatilities used in the pricing.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n    Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n    double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n    double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n    double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n    double volAtm = vols[1];\n    double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n    double vegaAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder sensiSmile = PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n      double vegaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm);\n      vegaAtm -= x[i] * vegaFwdAtm;\n      double vegaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i]);\n      sensiSmile = sensiSmile.combinedWith(\n          FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n              volatilities.getName(),\n              currencyPair,\n              timeToExpiry,\n              strikes[i],\n              forwardRate,\n              ccyCounter,\n              df * signedNotional * x[i] * vegaFwdSmile));\n    }\n    FxOptionSensitivity sensiAtm = FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n        volatilities.getName(),\n        currencyPair,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        strikes[1],\n        forwardRate,\n        ccyCounter,\n        df * signedNotional * vegaAtm);\n    return sensiAtm.combinedWith(sensiSmile);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n    Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n    double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n    double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n    double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n    double volAtm = vols[1];\n    double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n    double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n      double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n      double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n      double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n      deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\n    }\n    double price = df * priceFwd;\n    double delta = df * deltaFwd * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n    CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n  private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option) {\n    return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n        Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n  private double[] vannaVolgaWeights(\n      double forward,\n      double strike,\n      double timeToExpiry,\n      double volATM,\n      double[] strikesReference) {\n\n    double lnk21 = Math.log(strikesReference[1] / strikesReference[0]);\n    double lnk31 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[0]);\n    double lnk32 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[1]);\n    double[] lnk = new double[3];\n    for (int loopvv = 0; loopvv < 3; loopvv++) {\n      lnk[loopvv] = Math.log(strikesReference[loopvv] / strike);\n    }\n    double[] x = new double[3];\n    double vega0 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[0], timeToExpiry, volATM);\n    double vegaFlat = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volATM);\n    double vega2 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[2], timeToExpiry, volATM);\n    x[0] = vegaFlat * lnk[1] * lnk[2] / (vega0 * lnk21 * lnk31);\n    x[2] = vegaFlat * lnk[0] * lnk[1] / (vega2 * lnk31 * lnk32);\n    return x;\n  }\n\n  private void validate(RatesProvider ratesProvider, BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate().equals(ratesProvider.getValuationDate()),\n        \"volatility and rate data must be for the same date\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getSmile().getStrikeCount() == 3, \"the number of data points must be 3\");\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

* Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for FX European option trades with a Vanna-Volga method.\n * <p>\n * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}.\n * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\n */\npublic class VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  private final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}\n   * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\n   */\n  public VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\n    this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \"productPricer\");\n    this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \"paymentPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct, pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\n        productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsPremium = paymentPricer.presentValueSensitivity(premium, ratesProvider).build();\n    return pvcsProduct.combinedWith(pvcsPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.blackPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(blackPricer, \"blackPricer\");\n    this.vannaVolgaPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(vannaVolgaPricer,    trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // present value for one ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  // point sensitivity\n  private CurrencyParameterSensitivities pointSensitivity(\n FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities blackSmileVols = checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities);\n blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackVols);\n      return blackVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    }\n  }\n\n To control the method, pass an instance of\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionMethod} in the calculation parameters.\n * <p>\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED Vega market quote bucketed on volatility curves/surfaces}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the market convention base currency of the underlying FX.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currencyExposure)\n          .put(Measures.OPTION_DELTA, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::delta)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENT_CASH, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currentCash)\n          .put(Measures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::vegaMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, m, meth) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> targetType() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(FxEuropeanOptionTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair().getBase();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements ratesReqs = ratesLookup.requirements(\n        ImmutableSet.of(currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter()));\n ratesReqs.combinedWith(optionReqs);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // expand the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData = ratesLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData = optionLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxEuropeanOptionMethod method = parameters.findParameter(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.class).orElse(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.BLACK);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n    }\n    return results;\n Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for FxEuropeanOptionTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract To control the method, pass an instance of\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionMethod} in the calculation parameters.\n * <p>\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED Vega market quote bucketed on volatility curves/surfaces}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the market convention base currency of the underlying FX.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::presentValue)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currencyExposure)\n          .put(Measures.OPTION_DELTA, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::delta)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENT_CASH, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currentCash)\n          .put(Measures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::vegaMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, m, meth) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> targetType() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(FxEuropeanOptionTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair().getBase();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    FxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements ratesReqs = ratesLookup.requirements(\n        ImmutableSet.of(currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter()));\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements optionReqs = optionLookup.requirements(currencyPair);\n    return ratesReqs.combinedWith(optionReqs);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // expand the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData = ratesLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData = optionLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxEuropeanOptionMethod method = parameters.findParameter(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.class).orElse(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.BLACK);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for FxEuropeanOptionTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract \n23: /**\n24:  * Calculates pricing and risk measures for FX vanilla option trades.\n25:  * <p>\n26:  * This provides a high-level entry point for FX vanilla option pricing and risk measures.\n27:  * Pricing is performed using the Black method.\n28:  * <p>\n29:  * Each method takes a {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}, whereas application code will\n30:  * typically work with {@link .filter(adj -> !adj.equals(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE));\n174: \n175:     ZonedDateTime expiry = expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n176:     CurrencyPair ccyPair = PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n215:     double strike = Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n216:         underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n217:     csv.writeCell(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, product.getLongShort());\n218:     csv.writeCell(PUT_CALL_FIELD, putCall);\n219:     csv.writeCell(STRIKE_FIELD, strike);\n220:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, product.getExpiryDate());\n221:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, product.getExpiryTime());\n222:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, product.getExpiryZone());\n223:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n224:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, Math.abs(underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount()));\n225:     csv.writeCell(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n226:     csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getDate());\n227:     underlying.getPaymentDateAdjustment().ifPresent(bda -> {\n228:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD, bda.getCalendar());\n229:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, bda.getConvention());\n230:     });\n231:   }\n232: \n233:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n234:   // Restricted constructor.\n235:   private FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n236:   }\n237: \n238: }\n239: ","url":"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java"}}}

option).\\n40:  * <p>\\n41:  * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\\n42:  * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\\n43:  * <p>\\n44:  * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\\n45:  * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\\n46:  * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\\n47:  * <p>\\n48:  * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\\n34: \\n35: /**\\n36:  * FX (European) single barrier option.\\n37:  * <p>\\n38:  * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option to exchange two currencies at a specified future time\\n39:  * only when barrier event occurs (knock-in option) or does not occur (knock-out option).\\n40:  * <p>\\n41:  * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\\n42:  * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\\n43:  * <p>\\n44:  * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\\n45:  * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\\n46:  * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\\n47:  * <p>\\n48:  * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) of the barrier event, the option becomes worthless,\\n49:  * or alternatively, a rebate is made.\\n50:  */\\n51: @BeanDefinition\\n52: public final class FxSingleBarrierOption\\n53:     implements notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\\n75:    * The amount should be positive.\\n76:    */\\n77:   @PropertyDefinition(get = \\\"optional\\\")\\n78:   private final CurrencyAmount com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n34: \n35: /**\n36:  * FX (European) single barrier option.\n37:  * <p>\n38:  * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option to exchange two currencies at a specified future time\n39:  * only when barrier event occurs (knock-in option) or does not occur (knock-out option).\n40:  * <p>\n41:  * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\n42:  * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\n43:  * <p>\n44:  * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\n45:  * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\n46:  * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\n47:  * <p>\n48:  * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) of the barrier event, the option becomes worthless,\n49:  * or alternatively, a rebate is made.\n50:  */\n51: @BeanDefinition\n52: public final class FxSingleBarrierOption\n53:     implements \"notNull\")\n59:   private final FxVanillaOption underlyingOption;\n60:   /**\n61:    * The barrier description.\n62:    * <p>\n63:    * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n64:    * underlying FX transaction.\n65:    * <p>\n66:    * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n67:    */\n68:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n69:   private final Barrier barrier;\n70:   /**\n71:    * For a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the Call\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade#resolve(com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData) FxEuropeanOptionTrade::resolve(ReferenceData)}\n * to convert {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade} to {@code new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations calc;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * <p>\n   * In most cases, applications should use the {@link #DEFAULT} instance.\n   *\n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.calc = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(blackPricer, vannaVolgaPricer);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value across one or more scenarios.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value for a single set of market data.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method)   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n\n/**\n * FX (European) single barrier option.\n * <p>\n * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option to exchange two currencies at a specified future time\n * only when barrier event occurs (knock-in option) or does not occur (knock-out option).\n * <p>\n * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\n * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\n * <p>\n * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\n * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\n * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\n * <p>\n * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) of the barrier event, the option becomes worthless,\n * or alternatively, a rebate is made.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxSingleBarrierOption\n    implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying FX European option.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption;\n  /**\n   * The barrier description.\n   * <p>\n   * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n   * underlying FX transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Barrier barrier;\n  /**\n   * For a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\n   * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\n   * The amount should be positive.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(get = \"optional\")\n  private final CurrencyAmount rebate;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains FX single barrier option with rebate.\n   *\n   * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX European option\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @param rebate  the rebate\n   * @return the instance\n   */\n  public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier, CurrencyAmount rebate) {\n    return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n\n/**\n * FX (European) single barrier option.\n * <p>\n * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option to exchange two currencies at a specified future time\n * only when barrier event occurs (knock-in option) or does not occur (knock-out option).\n * <p>\n * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\n * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\n * <p>\n * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\n * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\n * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\n * <p>\n * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) of the barrier event, the option becomes worthless,\n * or alternatively, a rebate is made.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\n\n/**\n * Groups several utilities methods for CsvPlugins\n */\npublic final class CsvWriterUtils {\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor\n   */\n  private CsvWriterUtils() {\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param premium  the premium\n   */\n  public static void writePremiumFields(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, AdjustablePayment premium) {\n    writeAdjustablePayment(\n        csv,\n        premium,\n        PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row\n   * @param adjustablePayment  the adjustable payment\n   * @param amountField  the amount field\n   * @param currencyField  the currency field\n   * @param directionField  the direction field\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param dateConventionField  the date convention field\n   * @param dateCalendarField  the date calendar field\n   */\n  public static void writeAdjustablePayment(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      AdjustablePayment adjustablePayment,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField,\n      String dateField,\n      String dateConventionField,\n      String dateCalendarField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, adjustablePayment.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, adjustablePayment.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(adjustablePayment.getAmount()));\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getUnadjusted());\n    csv.writeCell(dateConventionField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getConvention());\n    csv.writeCell(dateCalendarField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getCalendar());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a currency amount using the provided fields\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param ccyAmount  the currency amount to write\n   * @param amountField  the amount header\n   * @param currencyField  the currency header\n   * @param directionField  the direction header\n   */\n  public static void writeCurrencyAmount(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      CurrencyAmount ccyAmount,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, ccyAmount.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, ccyAmount.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(ccyAmount.getAmount()));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a zoned date time using the provided field\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param zonedDateTime  the zoned date time object\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param timeField  the time field\n   * @param zoneField  the zone field\n   */\n  public static void writeZonedDateTime(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      ZonedDateTime zonedDateTime,\n      String dateField,\n      String timeField,\n      String zoneField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, zonedDateTime.toLocalDate());\n    csv.writeCell(timeField, zonedDateTime.toLocalTime());\n    csv.writeCell(zoneField, zonedDateTime.getZone());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a Barrier object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @param obsDate  the barrier observation date\n   */\n  public static void writeBarrier(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Barrier barrier, LocalDate obsDate) {\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierType());\n    csv.writeCell(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getKnockType());\n com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.NAME_FIELD;\n\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.AttributeType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfoBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.IborCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.CcpId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsIndexTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.deposit.TermDepositTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fra.FraTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxNdfTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPaymentTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.SwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.SwaptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Resolves additional information when parsing trade CSV files.\n * <p>\n * Data loaded from a CSV may contain additional information that needs to be captured.\n * This plugin point allows the additional CSV columns to be parsed and captured.\n */\npublic interface TradeCsvInfoResolver {\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the standard set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver standard() {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the specified set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver of(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.of(refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the reference data being used.\n   *\n   * @return the reference data\n   */\n  public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\n\n  /**\n   * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\n   * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\n    row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\n    row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\n   * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\n   * this is not recommended.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseTradeInfo(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    // do nothing\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called by each of the {@code completeTrade} methods.\n   *\n   * @param <T> the trade type\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default <T extends Trade> T completeTradeCommon(CsvRow row, T trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return trade;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FRA trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FraTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FraTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SecurityTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SecurityTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwapTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swaption trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwaptionTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, BulletPaymentTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, TermDepositTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Forward trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxSingleTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxSwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxSwapTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX European Option trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxNdfTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxNdfTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS Index trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException
